qas.a:
Integrated Defense

Security of ammunition and explosives based on attractiveness and availability to criminals

Visitor Register Log

Officials will escort individuals not on the EAL

Explosive Safety Standards

Identifies explosives facilities that require lightning protection systems

Grounding Systems

Provides requirements for grounding and lightning protection systems

Munitions Management

General storage requirements can be found here and this holds the responsibilities in guidance for munitions

Storage and outloading instructions for conventional ammunition

Defines the method for assigning locations in the warehouses

Air Force Munitions Surveillance Program and Serviceability Procedures

Sites JHCS as the primary data source for hazard class/division net explosive weight (NEW), hazard symbol and other explosive data such as compatibility group and asset identification information
Request form for CAS account for the System Administrator and grants access to their specific stock record account number (SRAN)

Munitions Authorization Record

This provides verification and identification of personnel authorized to receipt munitions and submit munitions expenditures and is used by the MASO, unit commander and munition custodians
These are placed munition assets to indicate the condition status of items

Preparing Hazardous Materials for Military Air Shipment

Provides guidance and procedures for air shipment
Outbound transportation protective service material checklist which is completed during shipping inspection before assets are handed over to transportation management
Issue release/receipt document holds the NSN, lot number, quantity, condition code, and transportation code (17 position number) CAS generated
Includes aircraft pallets nets tiedowns and coupling devices facilities handling equipment procedures and all other components

General Instructions for Inspection of Reusable Munitions Containers

All containers will be inspected for ammunition and explosive residue
